data.name: Lbl_ErrorCargar
data.value: Could not load settings. Default values will be applied.

data.name: Msg_ConfirmarEliminar
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Voucher_ListaVaciaDesc
data.value: Use the buttons above to scan your first voucher

data.name: Voucher_ConfirmarEliminarTodos
data.value: Delete all vouchers? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Voucher_PermisoCamaraMsg
data.value: The app needs camera access to scan vouchers.

data.name: Voucher_PermisoDenegadoMsg
data.value: Camera access is required to scan. Would you like to open settings?

data.name: Voucher_CamaraNoDisponible
data.value: Camera is not available on this device or emulator.

data.name: Voucher_ErrorOCR
Voucher_ReporteAccion
data.value: What would you like to do?

data.name: Mov_MontoInvalido
data.value: Enter a valid amount greater than zero

data.name: Config_OCRDesc
data.value: Improve data extraction using artificial intelligence.

data.name: Config_OCRModoAuto
data.value: 🤖 Automatic (cloud if available, local if not)

data.name: Config_RestaurarPregunta
data.value: Restore default settings? Your changes will be lost.

data.name: Config_OCRDescAuto
data.value: Uses cloud AI when internet and API key are available.\nFalls back to on-device OCR when offline or no key is set.

data.name: Config_OCRDescNativo
data.value: Always uses the phone's built-in OCR.\nWorks offline at no cost, but with lower accuracy.

data.name: Config_OCRDescGPT
data.value: Uses GPT-4o Vision by OpenAI.\nExcellent accuracy, extracts structured data directly.\nRequires internet and an OpenAI API key.

data.name: Config_OCRDescGoogle
data.value: Uses Google Cloud Vision.\nVery high accuracy for printed text.\nRequires internet and a Google Cloud API key.

data.name: Config_OCRDescNativoGPT
data.value: On-device OCR extracts text (free, no image upload).\nGPT-4o structures data from the text (~10× cheaper than Vision).\nRequires internet and an OpenAI API key.

data.name: Config_OCRDescFusion
data.value:
All three engines combined for maximum accuracy.
Local and Google Vision run in parallel; the most complete text is used.
GPT-4o structures the final result.
Requires internet, a Google Cloud API key and an OpenAI API key.

data.name: Config_GoogleKeyHint
data.value: Enable it at console.cloud.google.com → APIs → Vision API

data.name: Config_ElimDenomNoPredeterminada
data.value: Default denominations cannot be deleted.\nYou can only deactivate them using the toggle.

data.name: Config_ElimDenomConfirmar
Config_ErrorCambiarEstado
data.value: Could not change the denomination status

data.name: Config_RestaurarDetalle
data.value:
Are you sure you want to restore all settings to their defaults?

This includes:
• General settings
• Denomination states
• App theme

⚠️ Custom denominations will be kept but deactivated.

data.name: Config_RestauradaOK
data.value: Settings restored successfully.\nThe app has been reset to default values.

data.name: Notas_ContenidoObligatorio
data.value: Content is required for text notes

data.name: Notas_ConfirmarEliminar
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

data.name: Notas_TieneImagen
data.value: ⚠️ The image will also be deleted

data.name: Notas_AccionReporte
data.value: What would you like to do with the report?

data.name: Mov_EmptyMsg
data.value: Add your first movement using the form above

data.name: Mov_ConfirmarEliminar
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this movement?

data.name: Mov_AccionReporte
data.value: What would you like to do with the report?

data.name: Acerca_Feat1
data.value: 📱 Cash Register Reconciliation - Count monetary denominations

data.name: Acerca_Feat2
data.value: 💰 Movements - Track cash inflows and outflows

data.name: Acerca_Feat3
data.value: 📄 Vouchers & Tickets - OCR scanner to process receipts

data.name: Acerca_Feat4
data.value: 📝 Notes - Full system with text and images

data.name: Acerca_Tech4
data.value: • GPT4o - Always OpenAI GPT-4o Vision (requires network + Subscription)

data.name: Acerca_Tech5
data.value: • Google - Always Google Cloud Vision (requires network + Subscription)

data.name: Acerca_Tech8
data.value: • XAML + C# - Declarative UI and robust logic

data.name: Estadisticas_GananciaTooltip
data.value: Last count + Vouchers − Net movements balance

data.name: Premium_PagoSeguro
data.value: Secure payment via Mercado Pago · We'll send your license key by email after payment confirmation

data.name: Premium_ActivarDesc
data.value: Make the payment via Mercado Pago and send us the receipt to: qubitsoftxxi@gmail.com -- We'll reply with your license key within 24 hours.

data.name: Premium_EmailCuerpo
data.value: Hello, I'm attaching my payment receipt to activate the Premium plan. Please send me my license key. Thank you.

data.name: License_ClaveVacia
data.value: Please enter a valid license key.

data.name: License_NoEncontrada
data.value: No saved license found on this device.

data.name: License_Vencida
data.value: License has expired. Please renew your subscription.

data.name: License_Invalida
data.value: Invalid license key. Please verify that you copied it correctly.

data.name: Premium_LimiteSesionMsg
data.value: The Free plan allows 1 active session.\n\nUpgrade to Premium for unlimited sessions.

data.name: Premium_FuncionExportar
data.value: Export to PDF and Excel is available on the Premium plan.

data.name: Mov_ExportarSinDatos
data.value: There are no transactions to export with the current filter.

data.name: Sesiones_Desc
data.value: Each session has its own cash counts, movements, vouchers and notes.

data.name: Sesiones_Vacia
data.value: No sessions yet. Create your first one above!

data.name: Sesiones_ConfirmarEliminar
data.value:
Are you sure you want to delete this session?
⚠️ All its data will be deleted: cash counts, movements, vouchers and notes. This action cannot be undone.
